LIRR Committee meeting on 06/23/25 and Board meeting on 06/25/25 for procurement approval. Document dated June 16, 2025.

payload.description: FRA issued an unfunded mandate under the October 2023 Fast Act requiring CCTV systems in commuter passenger service lead locomotives and forward-facing cars.

tool_args.label: LIRR Audio-Visual Recording Monitoring (AVRM) System Upgrade
tool_args.raw_text: Gatekeeper System USA Inc. Three years + Warranty Period Contract # 400000000003442 $22,951,498 (estimated) ... replacement of Long Island Rail Road's ("LIRR") current Audio-Visual Recording Monitoring ("AVRM") system on its M7 fleets, C3 coaches, Diesel-Electric Dual Mode 30, and adding the system to the M3 fleet, totaling 1,087 railcars.

payload.project_name: LIRR Audio Visual Recording (AVRM) Monitoring System Upgrade
payload.description: Replacement of LIRR's current AVRM system on M7 fleets, C3 coaches, Diesel-Electric Dual Mode 30, and adding the system to M3 fleet, totaling 1,087 railcars. Awarded to Gatekeeper System USA Inc. for $22,951,498.

tool_args.label: FRA Mandate Non-Compliance
tool_args.raw_text: Currently, LIRR is not in compliance with the new FRA mandate due to the technological age of LIRR's existing CCTV system equipment and component obsolescence.

payload.claim_text: Currently, LIRR is not in compliance with the new FRA mandate due to the technological age of LIRR's existing CCTV system equipment and component obsolescence.
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road
payload.description: LIRR is not compliant with FRA mandate 49 CFR Part 229.136 due to aging CCTV equipment and component obsolescence.

tool_args.label: Service Disruption Risk from Non-Compliance
tool_args.raw_text: The AVRM currently in use must be replaced in order to ensure compliance, as train cars that do not meet the FRA mandate cannot be used in service, resulting in service disruption and delays.

payload.claim_text: The AVRM currently in use must be replaced in order to ensure compliance, as train cars that do not meet the FRA mandate cannot be used in service, resulting in service disruption and delays.
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road
payload.description: Train cars not meeting the FRA mandate cannot be used in service, causing service disruption and delays.

tool_args.label: Gatekeeper Best Overall Technical Solution
tool_args.raw_text: The SC unanimously agreed that Gatekeeper provided the best overall technical solution. Gatekeeper was found to be the most qualified firm to perform the work, as it (1) exceeded all technical requirements set forth in the RFP; (2) has significant experience; and (3) can meet the required milestone schedule.

payload.claim_text: The SC unanimously agreed that Gatekeeper provided the best overall technical solution. Gatekeeper was found to be the most qualified firm to perform the work, as it (1) exceeded all technical requirements set forth in the RFP; (2) has significant experience; and (3) can meet the required milestone schedule.
payload.subject: Gatekeeper System USA Inc.
payload.description: LIRR Selection Committee unanimously selected Gatekeeper as the best overall technical solution.

tool_args.label: Gatekeeper Lowest Price Among Proposers
tool_args.raw_text: Gatekeeper provided the lowest price: Gatekeeper $28,364,675, Railhead $45,046,534, and Wi-Tronix $28,997,200.

payload.claim_text: Gatekeeper provided the lowest price: Gatekeeper $28,364,675, Railhead $45,046,534, and Wi-Tronix $28,997,200.
payload.subject: Gatekeeper System USA Inc.
payload.description: Gatekeeper submitted the lowest initial price among the three firms invited to present.

tool_args.label: Gatekeeper Previous SEPTA Experience
tool_args.raw_text: Gatekeeper has successfully performed work of similar scope and size with Southeastern Pennsylvania Transportation Authority ("SEPTA"), an agency that deemed Gatekeeper's performance satisfactorily, meeting or exceeding performance standards within SEPTA's public transit agency.

payload.claim_text: Gatekeeper has successfully performed work of similar scope and size with Southeastern Pennsylvania Transportation Authority ("SEPTA"), an agency that deemed Gatekeeper's performance satisfactorily, meeting or exceeding performance standards within SEPTA's public transit agency.
payload.subject: Gatekeeper System USA Inc.
payload.description: Gatekeeper has successfully performed similar work for SEPTA.

tool_args.label: Warranty Terms for AVRM Contract
tool_args.raw_text: The three-year contract term includes warranty on workmanship for a period for one year from the installation of the equipment. Additional warranty coverage for hardware (includes all kit components) covered by the Technical Scope of Work shall be unconditionally warranted for a period of three years from the date of installation by the LIRR or 3.5 years post-delivery, whichever comes later, at no additional cost for parts and labor. Software covered by the Technical Scope of Work shall be unconditionally warranted for a period of three years after acceptance by the Railroad of qualification testing for each fleet type.

payload.claim_text: The three-year contract term includes warranty on workmanship for a period for one year from the installation of the equipment. Additional warranty coverage for hardware... shall be unconditionally warranted for a period of three years from the date of installation by the LIRR or 3.5 years post-delivery, whichever comes later, at no additional cost for parts and labor. Software... shall be unconditionally warranted for a period of three years after acceptance by the Railroad of qualification testing for each fleet type.
payload.subject: Gatekeeper System USA Inc.
payload.description: Warranty terms: 1 year workmanship, 3 years hardware, 3 years software with no additional cost.

tool_args.label: Cybersecurity Requirements Evaluated
tool_args.raw_text: This contract has been evaluated to determine the necessity and appropriate scope, if any, of cybersecurity requirements, including any requirements under federal, state, and local law and regulations. Any applicable cybersecurity requirements, to the extent required, have been included in the contract terms and conditions.

payload.claim_text: This contract has been evaluated to determine the necessity and appropriate scope, if any, of cybersecurity requirements, including any requirements under federal, state, and local law and regulations. Any applicable cybersecurity requirements, to the extent required, have been included in the contract terms and conditions.
payload.subject: Gatekeeper System USA Inc.
payload.description: Cybersecurity requirements evaluated and included in contract terms.

tool_args.label: Gatekeeper EO 16 Russia Certification
tool_args.raw_text: Gatekeeper has certified that pursuant to EO 16 it is not doing business in Russia.

payload.claim_text: Gatekeeper has certified that pursuant to EO 16 it is not doing business in Russia.
payload.subject: Gatekeeper System USA Inc.
payload.description: Gatekeeper certified compliance with EO 16 regarding Russia business.

tool_args.label: MBE/WBE/SDVOB Contract Goals
tool_args.raw_text: The MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights ("DDCR") has established a 3.6 percent MBE, 3.6 percent WBE, and 1 percent SDVOB goals for this contract. Gatekeeper is committed to meet the required goal requirements.

payload.claim_text: The MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights ("DDCR") has established a 3.6 percent MBE, 3.6 percent WBE, and 1 percent SDVOB goals for this contract. Gatekeeper is committed to meet the required goal requirements.
payload.subject: Gatekeeper System USA Inc.
payload.description: MTA DDCR established MBE (3.6%), WBE (3.6%), and SDVOB (1%) goals for the contract.

tool_args.label: No Prior MTA Contract Performance History
tool_args.raw_text: While the MTA has not done business with Gatekeeper... Gatekeeper has not recently completed any MTA contracts with goals; thus, no assessment of its performance is available at this time.

payload.missing_information: Gatekeeper has not recently completed any MTA contracts with goals; thus, no assessment of its performance is available at this time.
payload.description: Gatekeeper has not done business with the MTA previously, so no performance assessment is available for MTA contracts.

tool_args.label: AVRM Project Has Compliance Deadline
tool_args.raw_text: An ION was declared to accelerate this project. A Limited Notice of Award was issued to fund Engineering Design Work and to authorize the purchase of long lead time materials to meet the compliance date.

payload.description: The AVRM system upgrade is driven by and must meet the FRA October 12, 2027 compliance deadline. An ION was declared to accelerate the project to meet the compliance date.

tool_args.label: AVRM Project Has Board Action Event
tool_args.raw_text: Subject Request for Authorization to Award Various Procurements ... Committee 06/23/25 ... Board 06/25/25 ... JUNE 2025 LIST OF RATIFICATIONS FOR BOARD APPROVAL

payload.description: The Board action in June 2025 (Committee 06/23/25, Board 06/25/25) is the approval event for the AVRM system upgrade procurement.

tool_args.label: AVRM Project Triggered by FRA Mandate
tool_args.raw_text: The Federal Railroad Administration ("FRA") has issued an unfunded mandated (October 2023 Fast Act) in 49 CFR Part 229.136 that every lead locomotive and any car that could be used in a forward-facing position operating in commuter passenger service must be equipped with a CCTV system

payload.description: The FRA mandate (October 2023 Fast Act, 49 CFR Part 229.136) triggered the need for the AVRM system replacement project.

tool_args.label: Gatekeeper Awarded AVRM Contract
tool_args.raw_text: Contract award for the replacement of Long Island Rail Road's ("LIRR") current Audio-Visual Recording Monitoring ("AVRM") system ... award of a three-year estimated quantity contract to Gatekeeper System USA Inc.

payload.description: Gatekeeper System USA Inc. was awarded the contract for the LIRR AVRM system upgrade through a competitive RFP process.

tool_args.label: LIRR Implements AVRM Project
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR proposes to award ... Contract award for the replacement of Long Island Rail Road's ("LIRR") current Audio-Visual Recording Monitoring ("AVRM") system ... Requesting Department: LIRR Maintenance of Equipment

payload.description: Long Island Rail Road is the requesting department (LIRR Maintenance of Equipment) for the AVRM system upgrade.

tool_args.label: FRA Mandates AVRM Compliance
tool_args.raw_text: The Federal Railroad Administration ("FRA") has issued an unfunded mandated (October 2023 Fast Act) in 49 CFR Part 229.136 that every lead locomotive and any car that could be used in a forward-facing position operating in commuter passenger service must be equipped with a CCTV system

payload.description: The FRA issued the mandate that drives the AVRM system upgrade requirements.
